hero.description: Zakra connects to your enterprise databases, learns your business context, and gives every team member a natural-language interface to the information they need — without writing a single query.

terminal.title: zakra — workspace — analytics_db
terminal.userPrompt: How many active users signed up last month?

features.headline: Built for enterprise data teams.
features.subheadline: Built for enterprise teams that need reliable answers from complex, multi-source data — without engineering overhead on every request.

nlq.title: Natural Language Queries
nlq.body: Ask in plain English. Zakra queries your databases, surfaces the answer, and cites the exact source row — no SQL required.

federation.title: Multi-Source Federation
federation.body: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, REST APIs. One connection panel, full query federation across all your data sources simultaneously.

access.title: Fine-Grained Access Control
access.body: Permissions scoped per company, department, and dataset. Nobody sees what they shouldn't. Role inheritance built in.

knowledge.title: Curated Knowledge Base
knowledge.body: Augment AI answers with verified articles, SOPs, and runbooks. Ground every response in company-approved truth.

multitenant.title: Multi-Tenant Architecture
multitenant.body: Manage hundreds of tenants from one admin dashboard. Separate data, separate roles, unified control surface.

audit.title: Audit & Compliance
audit.body: Every query logged, every access traced. Export-ready for SOC2, ISO 27001, and GDPR on demand.

demo.description: Connect your databases in minutes. Invite your team. Start getting answers the same day — without a single line of code or a data engineering ticket.
steps: Invite your team with role-based access
Ask questions in plain English — no SQL

cta.description: Get Zakra set up in under an hour. Connect your first database, invite your team, and start getting answers today.
cta.disclaimer: No credit card · Free 14-day trial · Cancel anytime

footer.tagline: Enterprise knowledge management, powered by AI.

newsletter.heading: Newsletter
newsletter.description: Product updates, enterprise guides, and new integrations. No spam.
newsletter.success: You're on the list. We'll be in touch.
